_comment: Example .rcrb/mcp.json wiring four canonical retention data sources via their MCP servers. Every command/url/tool below is a placeholder — replace with the actual values for the MCP server you've installed. The point: this file is the entire surface area for adding a new source. No code changes needed.

sources.label: subscriptions
sources._about: RevenueCat — subscription lifecycle (purchases, renewals, cancellations, refunds).
sources.command: <launch command for the RC MCP, e.g. npx>
sources.hint: RevenueCat customer events. user_id should be the app user id (not the RC subscriber id).

sources.label: billing
sources._about: Stripe — payment success/failure, customer cancellations, refunds.
sources.hint: Stripe events. Resolve the customer's app_user_id from customer.metadata.app_user_id when available; otherwise fall back to email.

sources.label: errors
sources._about: Sentry — crash and client errors per user.
sources.url: <HTTP URL of the Sentry MCP, if you use the hosted one>
sources.hint: Sentry issues. user_id should be the app user id from the issue's user context.
